name: ILNodeControlStop
title: ILNodeControlStop
description: Stops the interaction layer of the specified simulation node. Cyclical sending of messages is stopped and setting of signals is not possible anymore. The specified node must be in the current bus context. In all other cases the function has no effect and will return with an error.

parameters.name: aNodeName
parameters.description: Name of the node of which the interaction layer should be stopped.
